thesis: AFTER-HOURS window by the clock (~4:48pm ET, generated 2026-07-19T20:48:25Z) but today is SUNDAY 7/19 — a WEEKEND, market closed (deterministic marketClosed=true) — so there is NO after-hours session and no live reaction to read; the after-hours mandate collapses to planning the next cash session, MONDAY 7/20, the first session AFTER Friday's monthly OPEX. No bar has printed since Friday's 7/17 settle, so the Monday plan is UNCHANGED in substance. This run refreshed only the bars cache (updated 2026-07-19T20:48:19Z, 285 series), the sector RRG tool read (asOf 2026-07-19T20:48:25Z) and the real-assets BTC-USD sub-read (2026-07-19T00:00Z, now 44.8 / Mixed); ETF-momentum, global-rotation and the rest of the real-assets reads are still CARRIED from Friday's 2026-07-17T13:30Z run. STRUCTURE FIRST: the most-recent CONFIRMED completed daily bar is Friday's 7/17 close. SPY 743.29 stays bull-stacked (20>50>200) but closed the week essentially AT its rising 50-day (+0.01%, ~743.2) and -1.89% off the 52-week high (~757.6); mom126/252 +8.24%/+20.39% — a healthy tech-led bull DIGESTING near all-time highs with the 50-day the line into Monday. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: 7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17 = 7 (7/17 confirmed; the weekend adds no bar and intraday reruns are NOT counted). What Friday's close confirmed and the weekend leaves intact: (1) QQQ 695.33 remains OUT of its bull-stack — TANGLED and -3.23% below its 50-day (~718.5, mom5 -4.16), the reclaim it never won still unwon; (2) the lone structural crack MSFT (393.82) is clawing back toward its 50-day — now -1.87% below the line (~401.3, mom5 +2.26) but STILL bear-stacked and -10.06% under its 200-day (~437.9), contesting the reclaim from below, not through it; (3) the stretched momentum/semis leaders stayed heavy (SPMO mom5 -6.41, VGT -4.22, SOXX rsMom1m -11.06 now Lagging, 0/12 up-momentum, 1/12 above the 50-day). The DEFENSIVE/ENERGY rotation is CONFIRMED and energy-led on this run's fresh RRG: XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.3>100, accel +2.43 board-best, rsMom 102.8 board-best, +12.54% >200d, rotation into) with oil firming (USO Uptrend 47.4 mom21 +7.35, BNO Uptrend 50.5 mom21 +10.96, DBC broad-commodity Uptrend 52.8 — carried from Friday 13:30Z); the sector model's live read is 'Rotate toward XLE as XLV weakens' (XLV Weakening, accel -2.56 the worst on the board); XLRE stays Leading while XLF (Peaking) and XLP roll and XLV/XLI Weakening. VIX 18.77 is LOW but FIRM (Friday close, carried over the weekend) — under the 3-point single-reference regime-change threshold but the multi-session firming persists. TACTICAL, last: Friday's monthly OPEX is RESOLVED — dealer gamma has RESET for the new monthly cycle, so any prior OPEX pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; Monday's gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing anything off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed. Plan into Monday's open (there is no session to trade tonight): HOLD the bull-stack over the weekend (do NOT add index beta with SPY on its 50-day, QQQ tangled below its 50-day and vol firm); watch the Asia/Europe weekend/overnight tape and whether SPY holds ~743.2 / QQQ reclaims ~718.5 at the open; ROTATE toward the now-Leading, oil-confirmed XLE over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, rolling semis into any relief; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it contests its 50-day from below, into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail after re-verifying the live path.
